name: mcp-macos-cua
description: macOS Computer Use Agent - GUI automation via screenshots, clicks, typing, accessibility, and AppleScript

hooks.command: diff -q "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json" >/dev/null 2>&1 || (mkdir -p "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cd "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}" && cp "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/package.json" . && npm install --silent) || rm -f "${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA}/package.json"
